image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about fast twitch muscle.
Context visual: Fast twitch muscles are the body's powerhouses, perfect for explosive movements.
Escalation visual: But did you know they fatigue quickly? That's why sprinters rely on them.
Evidence visual: Research shows fast twitch fibers can be trained, enhancing performance in short bursts.
Payoff visual: So, whether you're sprinting or lifting, fast twitch muscles are your secret weapon.
Cta visual: Want to learn more about your muscles? Hit that follow button!
